name: Ability-en
ddl: CREATE TABLE "Ability-en" (Key INTEGER, "DLCFlags" INTEGER, "IconId" INTEGER, "Name" TEXT, "Description" TEXT, "Unknown10" TEXT, "Unknown14" INTEGER, "Unknown16" INTEGER, "Unknown17" INTEGER, "Unknown18" INTEGER, "Unknown19" INTEGER, "Unknown1A" INTEGER, "Comment" TEXT, "UiId" INTEGER, "BattleVoiceIds" TEXT, "UiId2" INTEGER, "Unknown30" INTEGER, "Unknown34" INTEGER, "AbilityReactionVoiceTypeId" INTEGER, "Unknown3C" INTEGER, "JpCost1" INTEGER, "JpCost2" INTEGER, "IsRandomDamage" INTEGER, "IsRandomStatus" INTEGER);
rows: Healing magick that restores a small amount of HP to distant units.
Strong healing magick that restores a moderate amount of HP to distant units.
Powerful healing magick that restores a large amount of HP to distant units.
Healing magick replete with divine power that restores a vast amount of HP to distant units.
Sacred magick that revives a distant unit from KO.
Sacred magick that revives a distant unit from KO with full HP.
Sacred magick that grants Reraise to a distant unit.
Magick that invigorates life force, granting Regen to distant units.
Blessing that wards against physical attacks, granting Protect to distant units.
Blessing that wards against physical attacks, granting Protect to distant units. Vertical range is improved compared to the Protect spell.
Blessing that wards against magickal attacks, granting Shell to distant units.
Blessing that wards against magickal attacks, granting Shell to distant units. Vertical range is improved compared to the Shell spell.
Almighty blessing that grants Protect and Shell to a distant unit.
Cleansing light that removes various status ailments from distant units.
Sacred light that banishes darkness, dealing holy damage to a distant unit.
Magick that ignites searing flames, dealing fire damage to distant units.
Magick that ignites ferocious flames, dealing fire damage to distant units.
Magick that ignites incinerating flames, dealing fire damage to distant units.
Magick that ignites infernal flames, dealing fire damage to distant units.
Magick that calls down scouring lightning bolts, dealing lightning damage to distant units.
Magick that calls down piercing lightning bolts, dealing lightning damage to distant units.
Magick that calls down devastating lightning bolts, dealing lightning damage to distant units.
Magick that calls down heavens-rending lightning bolts, dealing lightning damage to distant units.
Magick that rains down pillars of ice, dealing ice damage to distant units.
Magick that rains down large pillars of ice, dealing ice damage to distant units.
Magick that rains down massive pillars of ice, dealing ice damage to distant units.
Magick that rains down colossal pillars of ice, dealing ice damage to distant units.
Magick that generates toxins within the body, inflicting Poison on distant units.
Magick that inflicts Toad status on a distant unit, or removes it from one under such a curse.
Powerful magick that ravages the vitality of a distant unit, dealing damage equal to its maximum HP to cause an instant KO.
Magick that converts arcane energy into intense heat to smite a distant unit.
Magick that speeds the passage of time, granting Haste to distant units.
Magick that speeds the passage of time, granting Haste to distant units. Vertical range is improved compared to the Haste spell.
Magick that delays the passage of time, inflicting Slow on distant units.
Magick that delays the passage of time, inflicting Slow on distant units. Vertical range is improved compared to the Slow spell.
Magick that halts the passage of time, inflicting Stop on distant units.
Magick that creates an anomaly in space to hinder movement, inflicting Immobilize on distant units.
Magick that warps space, granting Float to distant units.
Magick that creates a magick-repelling field, granting Reflect to a distant unit.
Magick that hastens the localized passage of time, allowing the next turn of a distant unit to come immediately.
Magick that conjures gravitational forces, reducing the HP of distant units by a small proportion of their maximum.
Magick that conjures powerful gravitational forces, reducing the HP of distant units by a large proportion of their maximum.
Magick that warps space-time, causing an enormous meteor to descend and smite distant units.
Sacrifices HP to restore the HP of an adjacent unit.
Manipulates the faculties to temporarily rob sight, inflicting Blindness on distant units.
Manipulates the balance of creation to absorb MP from a distant unit.
Manipulates the balance of creation to absorb HP from a distant unit.
Temporarily fills the soul with a zealous fervor, granting Faith status to a distant unit.
Temporarily drains the soul of piety, inflicting Atheist on a distant unit.
Manipulates the laws of creation to transform the flesh, inflicting Undead status on a distant unit.
Manipulates the faculties to temporarily rob speech, inflicting Silence on distant units.
Imparts a thirst for destruction, inflicting Berserk on a distant unit.
Instills cowardice, reducing a distant unit's bravery for the duration of battle.
Divests the mind of rational thought, inflicting Confusion on a distant unit.
Restores the balance of creation, removing beneficial status effects from a distant unit.
Manipulates the faculties to temporarily restrict actions, inflicting Disable on distant units.
Manipulates body and mind to cause a deep slumber, inflicting Sleep on distant units.
Manipulates the laws of creation to cause petrification, inflicting Stone on a distant unit.
Summons Moogle to cast Moogle Charm, which soothes injuries with a purifying breeze, restoring a small amount of HP to distant allies.
Summons Shiva to unleash Diamond Dust, which punishes with a frigid breath, dealing ice damage to distant foes.
Summons Ramuh to unleash Judgment Bolt, which rains down bolts of lightning, dealing lightning damage to distant foes.
Summons Ifrit to unleash Hellfire, which scorches the battlefield, dealing fire damage to distant foes.
Summons Titan to unleash Gaia's Wrath, which levels the land with a mighty blow, dealing earth damage to distant foes.

Summons Golem to invoke Earthen Wall, which makes all allies immune to physical damage up to an amount equal to the summoner's maximum HP.
Certain attacks ignore Earthen Wall.
Summons Carbuncle to invoke Ruby Light, which grants Reflect to distant allies.
Summons Bahamut to unleash Megaflare, a fearsome breath attack that devastates distant foes.
Summons Odin to perform Zantetsuken, a sword attack that cleaves through distant foes.
Summons Leviathan to unleash Tsunami, which engulfs the battlefield in a massive tidal wave, dealing water damage to distant foes.
Summons Salamander to unleash Wyrmfire, which scorches the battlefield with savage flames, dealing fire damage to distant foes.
Summons Sylph to invoke Whispering Wind, which employs the lingering life force of windswept leaves, inflicting Silence on distant foes.
Summons Faerie to invoke Fey Light, which bathes the battlefield in warming rays, restoring a moderate amount of HP to distant allies.
Summons Lich to unleash Descending Darkness, an attack born of shadow, dealing dark damage that reduces the HP of distant foes by a large proportion of their maximum.
Summons Cyclops to unleash Climactic Fear, which smites distant foes with forceful blows that rend the battlefield asunder.
Summons Zodiark to unleash Final Eclipse, which smites distant foes with radiant beams of focused starlight.
Invokes Spirit Blade, the spirit of the Ashura, causing an unseen specter-sword to slash at surrounding foes.
Invokes Binding Darkness, the spirit of the Kotetsu, loosing a wave of howling dark spirits to attack surrounding foes.
Invokes Verse of Oblivion, the spirit of the Bizen Osafune, sending the whispering dead to feed on the MP of surrounding foes.
Invokes Rain of Wisdom, the spirit of the Murasame, raining tears of an enlightened soul to restore HP to oneself and surrounding allies.
Invokes Cloudsea Curse, the spirit of the Ame-no-Murakumo, unleashing a phantom of pure mist to attack surrounding foes and has a chance of inflicting Slow.
Invokes Purifying Breeze, the spirit of the Kiyomori, whose effervescent life force grants Protect and Shell to the user and surrounding allies.
Invokes Doomed Aspirations, the spirit of the Muramasa, which attacks surrounding foes and has a chance of inflicting Confusion or Doom.
Invokes Sanguine Blossom, the spirit of the Kiku-ichimonji, which lashes out with all-consuming hatred to attack foes in a straight line.
Invokes Ethereal Embrace, the spirit of the Masamune, whose unbridled life force grants Regen and Haste to the user and surrounding allies.
Invokes Raging Inferno, the spirit of the Chirijiraden, which manifests as a band of blue flame that attacks surrounding foes.
A song pleading for angelic protection. On each turn spent performing, restores MP to all allies.
A song praising the vibrance of life. On each turn spent performing, restores HP to all allies.
A song of encouragement and inspiration. On each turn spent performing, increases the speed of all allies for the duration of battle.
A gallant song of battles fought and won. On each turn spent performing, increases the physical attack power of all allies for the duration of battle.
A song of the laws of sorcery and of the source of magick. On each turn spent performing, increases the magickal attack power of all allies for the duration of battle.
A thoroughly mysterious song passed down through many an age. On each turn spent performing, grants one of several beneficial statuses to all allies.
The ultimate song. On each turn spent performing, allows the next turn of all allies to come immediately.
A dance renowned for its esoteric moves. On each turn spent performing, reduces the MP of all foes.
A dance exemplified by its fervent steps. On each turn spent performing, deals damage to all foes.
A dance best known for its sedate pace. On each turn spent performing, reduces the speed of all foes for the duration of battle.
A quick, vivacious dance. On each turn spent performing, reduces the physical attack power of all foes for the duration of battle.
An exotic dance that clouds the mind. On each turn spent performing, reduces the magickal attack power of all foes for the duration of the battle.
A mesmerizing dance. On each turn spent performing, inflicts one of several status ailments on all foes.
The ultimate dance. On each turn spent performing, reduces the CT of all enemies to zero.
Turns in a circle, striking with backhand blows to attack adjacent units.
Strikes many times in quick succession to attack an adjacent unit.
Unleashes one's martial spirit to attack a distant unit.
Releases spiritual energy mighty enough to rend the earth. Deals earth damage to units in a straight line.
Invites slow, certain death with blows to pressure points. Inflicts Doom on an adjacent unit.
Releases positive energy to remove status ailments from oneself and adjacent units.
Draws out the energy within the body's chakra points to restore HP and MP to oneself and adjacent units.
With a powerful battle cry, revives an adjacent KO'd unit.
Pilfers gil from an adjacent foe.
Captures the target's heart, enthralling them. Inflicts Charmed on a distant foe.
Purloins an adjacent foe's equipped headwear.
Purloins an adjacent foe's equipped combat garb.
Purloins an adjacent foe's equipped shield.
Purloins an adjacent foe's equipped weapon.
Purloins an adjacent foe's equipped accessory.
Pilfers experience points from an adjacent unit, making them one's own.
Persuades a distant foe to become an ally. At the end of battle, that unit will officially join your party.
Persuades the listener to wait before acting. Resets a distant unit's CT to zero.
Praises the listener's feats and strengths. Increases the bravery of a distant unit.
Plays upon the doubts and fears of the listener. Reduces the bravery of a distant unit.
Explains the nature of divine miracles, deepening belief. Increases the faith of a distant unit.
Assails with cold logic and secular doctrine, undermining belief. Reduces the faith of a distant unit.
Convinces the listener that their demise is soon at hand. Inflicts Doom on a distant unit.
Tricks the listener into investing their hard-won coin. Obtains gil from a distant foe.
Infuriates with foul invective. Inflicts Berserk on a distant unit.
Imitates the dull tales of a famed professor to induce slumber. Inflicts Sleep on distant units.
Manifests the power harbored by the soil or wasteland at one's feet. Deals damage to distant units and has a chance of inflicting Immobilize.
Manifests the power harbored by the canal, river, lake, ocean, or waterfall at one's feet. Deals water damage to distant units and has a chance of inflicting Toad.
Manifests the power harbored by the grassland, underbrush, or tanglevine at one's feet. Deals damage to distant units and has a chance of inflicting Stop.
Manifests the power harbored by the gravel, flagstone, stone wall, earthen wall, or gravestone at one's feet. Deals damage to distant units and has a chance of inflicting Stone.
Manifests the power harbored by the stone outcropping or basalt at one's feet. Deals earth damage to distant units and has a chance of inflicting Confusion.
Manifests the power harbored by the book, tree, brick, bridge, furnishings, iron plate, moss, or coffin at one's feet. Deals wind damage to distant units and has a chance of inflicting Disable.
Manifests the power harbored by the wooden floor, carpet, coffer, stairs, or wooden deck at one's feet. Deals fire damage to distant units and has a chance of inflicting Sleep.
Manifests the power harbored by the marsh, swamp, or poisonous fen at one's feet. Deals water damage to distant units and has a chance of inflicting Doom.
Manifests the power harbored by the sand, stalactites, or salt flat at one's feet. Deals wind damage to distant units and has a chance of inflicting Blindness.
Manifests the power harbored by the snow at one's feet. Deals ice damage to distant units and has a chance of inflicting Silence.
Manifests the power harbored by the roof or chimney at one's feet. Deals wind damage to distant units and has a chance of inflicting Slow.
Manifests the power harbored by the lava or machinery at one's feet. Deals fire damage to distant units and has a chance of causing instant KO.
A powerful technique that destroys the item equipped on the target's head. If no item is equipped, the effect is the same as the standard Attack command.
A powerful technique that destroys the item equipped on the target's body. If no item is equipped, the effect is the same as the standard Attack command.
A powerful technique that destroys the target's equipped shield. If no shield is equipped, the effect is the same as the standard Attack command.
A powerful technique that destroys the target's equipped weapon. If no weapon is equipped, the effect is the same as the standard Attack command.
A deft technique that reduces the target's MP, but deals no damage.
A deft technique that reduces the target's speed, but deals no damage.
A deft technique that reduces the target's physical attack power, but deals no damage.
A deft technique that reduces the target's magickal attack power, but deals no damage.
Increases one's own physical attack power for the duration of battle.
Attacks by ramming an adjacent unit, and has a chance of knocking it back. The damage dealt varies greatly.
Lobs a stone at a distant unit, and has a chance of knocking it back. The damage dealt varies greatly.
A battlefield treatment that removes Poison, Blindness, and Silence from an adjacent unit.
Words of encouragement that increase the speed of a distant unit for the duration of battle.
Cheers on a distant unit, increasing its bravery for the duration of battle.
Sacrifices HP to restore the HP of an adjacent unit.
A hearty battle cry that increases one's own bravery, speed, and physical and magickal attack power for the duration of battle.
Almighty magick that attacks distant foes.
Channels holy energy through one's sword. Attacks distant units and has a chance of inflicting Stop.
Channels holy energy through one's sword. Attacks a distant unit and has a chance of inflicting Doom.
Channels holy energy through one's sword. Attacks a distant unit and has a chance of causing instant KO.
Channels holy energy through one's sword. Attacks distant units and has a chance of inflicting Silence.
Channels holy energy through one's sword. Attacks units in a straight line and has a chance of inflicting Confusion.
A puissant sword technique that strikes a distant unit and destroys the item equipped on its body. If no item is equipped, the attack's potency is reduced.
A puissant sword technique that strikes a distant unit and destroys the item equipped on its head. If no item is equipped, the attack's potency is reduced.
A puissant sword technique that strikes a distant unit and destroys its equipped weapon. If no weapon is equipped, the attack's potency is reduced.
A puissant sword technique that strikes a distant unit and destroys its equipped accessory. If no accessory is equipped, the attack's potency is reduced.
Employs the power of darkness to absorb a distant unit's MP.
Employs the power of darkness to absorb a distant unit's HP.
Magick that calls forth a pitch-black void, dealing dark damage to a distant unit.
Calls upon sacred light to remove various status ailments from a distant unit.
Halts the passage of the stars, inflicting Stop, Immobilize, and Disable on all foes.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing lightning damage.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing fire damage.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing wind damage.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing water damage.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect and has a chance of inflicting one of several status ailments.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing earth damage.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing lightning damage.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing fire damage.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing wind damage.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing water damage.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect and has a chance of inflicting one of several status ailments.
A mantra that attacks with words of enlightenment. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing earth damage.
Hinders the flow of chi within the body, inflicting Stone on a distant unit.
Binds the shadow of a distant unit to the earth, inflicting Stop.
An advanced assassination technique that targets an adjacent unit, causing instant KO.
Ancient magick that attacks a distant unit, dealing damage based on the caster's HP loss.
Ancient magick that attacks a distant unit, dealing damage based on the target's current MP.
A powerful strike that reduces the MP of distant units.
A powerful strike that reduces the speed of distant units for the duration of battle.
A powerful strike that reduces the physical attack power of distant units for the duration of battle.
A powerful strike that reduces the magickal attack power of distant units for the duration of battle.
Feast on an adjacent unit's blood with elongated fangs, absorbing their HP and inflicting Vampire status.
Uses honeyed words to enthrall, inflicting Charmed on a distant unit.
Exudes toxic mist. Attacks distant units, and has a chance of inflicting Blindness.
Exudes toxic mist. Attacks distant units, and has a chance of inflicting Poison.
Exudes toxic mist. Attacks distant units, and has a chance of inflicting Oil.
Exudes a potent toxic mist. Attacks distant units, inflicting Toad.
Exudes a potent toxic mist. Attacks distant units, inflicting Slow.
Exudes a potent toxic mist. Attacks distant units, inflicting Silence.
Exudes a potent toxic mist. Attacks distant units, inflicting Stone.
Exudes a devastating toxic mist. Attacks distant units, and has a chance of inflicting Undead status.
Exudes a devastating toxic mist. Attacks distant units, and has a chance of causing instant KO.
Exudes a devastating toxic mist. Attacks distant units, and has a chance of inflicting Stone.
A powerful blessing that grants an array of status enhancements to a distant unit.
An attack that targets the legs, inflicting Immobilize.
An attack that targets the arms, inflicting Disable.
An attack that targets the cursed soul, inflicting Stone on a unit with Undead status.
Releases exploding bomblets, dealing damage to an adjacent unit.
Releases exploding bomblets, dealing damage to an adjacent unit.
Channels magick through one's blade to inflict Blindness on a distant unit.

Channels magick through one's blade to inflict Disable on a distant unit.

Exhales freezing breath, dealing ice damage to a distant unit.
Exhales flaming breath, dealing fire damage to a distant unit.
Exhales fulminating breath, dealing lightning damage to a distant unit.
Communicates mentally in a way perceivable only by wyrmkind to persuade a distant dragon or hydra type enemy to become an ally. At the end of battle, that unit will officially join your party.
Manifests draconic power to forfeit one's HP to restore HP to a distant dragon or hydra type unit and remove its status ailments.
Manifests draconic power to increase the bravery, speed, and physical and magickal attack power of a distant dragon or hydra type unit for the duration of battle.
Manifests draconic power to warp time, allowing the next turn of a distant dragon or hydra type unit to come immediately.
Exhales breath replete with divine power. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing holy damage.
Channels magick through one's blade to attack a distant unit, dealing damage based on one's HP loss.
Harnesses power pushed to the limits to unleash a burst of blade energy, dealing damage to a distant unit.
Harnesses power pushed to the limits to deliver mighty crossing slashes, dealing damage to distant units.
Harnesses power pushed to the limits to unleash blade energy at a distant unit, dealing damage based on one's HP loss.
Harnesses power pushed to the limits to unleash blade energy at a distant unit, dealing damage based on the target's HP loss.
Harnesses power pushed to the limits to unleash blade energy, calling down meteorites that deal damage to distant units.
Harnesses power pushed to the limits to unleash blade energy, inflicting instant KO, Stone, or Stop on distant units.
Harnesses power pushed to the limits to unleash an ultimate Limit attack, dealing damage to distant units.
Harnesses power pushed to the limits to unleash the mightiest of Limit attacks, dealing damage to distant units.
Pecks with an enormous beak to attack an adjacent unit.
Launches concealed spheres to attack a distant unit.
Rains down a meteorite to attack a distant unit.
With a cleansing flap of the wings, removes status ailments from the caster and adjacent units.
With an invigorating flap of the wings, restores HP to the caster and adjacent units.
Uses a rushing body blow to attack an adjacent unit.
Administers a thorough beating to an adjacent unit, dealing damage based on one's HP loss.
Delivers a whirling punch to attack adjacent units.
Attacks the eyes, inflicting Blindness on an adjacent unit.
Bites down and sucks the blood of an adjacent unit, absorbing its HP.
Bites with an enormous mouth to attack an adjacent unit.
Releases exploding bomblets, dealing magickal damage to an adjacent unit.
Triggers a self detonation, dealing damage based on one's HP loss to oneself and adjacent units. Also inflicts Oil.
Shoots out flames to attack a distant unit, dealing fire damage.
Spews flames with wild abandon, dealing fire damage to surrounding units while restoring one's HP.
Swipes with keen-edged claws to attack an adjacent unit.
Kicks with the hind legs to attack an adjacent unit. The damage dealt varies greatly.
Releases luminous energy, inflicting Stone or Stop on a distant unit.
Bites down to inject venom, inflicting Poison on an adjacent unit.
Bites down to feast on the blood of an adjacent unit, absorbing its HP. Also has a chance of inflicting Vampire.
Whips long, thin tentacles to attack an adjacent unit.
Belches black ink, inflicting Blindness on a distant unit.
Produces uncanny sound waves, removing various status enhancements from the user and surrounding units.
Disrupts the psyche, inflicting Confusion or Berserk on distant units.
Removes a fragment of the soul, lowering a distant unit's level by 1.
Strikes with a bony-handed chop to attack an adjacent unit.
Unleashes a levin spirit to attack a distant unit, dealing lightning damage.
Unleashes an aqueous spirit to attack a distant unit, dealing water damage.
Unleashes a gelid spirit to attack a distant unit, dealing ice damage.
Unleashes a blustery spirit to attack a distant unit, dealing wind damage.
Invokes a mass of spectral energy to attack a distant unit.
Infuses tainted energies with a touch, inflicting Undead status on an adjacent unit.
Infuses tainted energies with a touch, inflicting Sleep on an adjacent unit.
Drains vital energies with a touch, absorbing the HP of an adjacent unit.
Touches with a slimy hand, inflicting Oil on an adjacent unit.
Uses a mighty flap of the wings to attack an adjacent unit.
Uses the accursed gaze of a massive eye to inflict a status ailment on a distant unit.
Uses the frightful gaze of a massive eye to reduce the bravery of a distant unit for the duration of battle.
Uses the maddening gaze of a massive eye to reduce the magickal attack power of a distant unit for the duration of battle.
Uses the demoralizing gaze of a massive eye to inflict Doom on a distant unit.
Swoops down with sharp talons to attack an adjacent unit.
Pecks vital points with a long beak, inflicting Stone on an adjacent unit.
Snatches shiny objects, stealing gil from an adjacent foe.
Drops an explosive feather to attack a distant unit.
Attacks ferociously, reducing the physical attack power of an adjacent unit for the duration of battle.
Rushes forward at full tilt to attack an adjacent unit.
Mesmerizes with a ferocious snort, inflicting Charmed on an adjacent foe.
Rouses with a fierce cry, reviving an adjacent unit from KO with full HP.
Unleashes eye-watering flatulence, inflicting Confusion or Sleep on an adjacent unit.
The ultimate act of porcine altruism. Sacrifices oneself to fully restore the HP and MP of an adjacent unit, and raise their level by 1. The sacrificed unit transforms into a crystal.
Sprinkles leaves about to attack adjacent units.
Employs the life force of leaves to grant Protect to adjacent units.
Employs the life force of leaves to grant Shell to adjacent units.
Employs the life force of leaves to restore the HP of adjacent units.
Employs the life force of leaves to restore the MP of adjacent units.
Swings a pickaxe to attack an adjacent unit.
Spins fiercely with the pickaxe to attack adjacent units.
Stamps the earth to unleash a shockwave, dealing earth damage to surrounding units.

Belches forth sticky secretions from deep within to inflict Immobilize on an adjacent unit.
Belches forth putrid stench to inflict various status ailments on surrounding units.
Covers an adjacent unit in malboro spores, turning it into a malboro. This condition cannot be cured.
Thrusts upwards with piercing horns to attack an adjacent unit.
Assaults its victim by goring and tossing. Attacks an adjacent unit, and has a chance of causing instant KO.
Calls forth a tornado to attack distant units, dealing wind damage that reduces the HP of targets by a moderate proportion of their maximum.
Warps time and space to attack distant units, dealing damage based on one's HP loss.
Emits a burst of white-hot energy to attack distant units.
Charges forward to attack an adjacent unit.
Swings a thick tail to attack an adjacent unit. The damage dealt varies greatly.
Exhales freezing breath, dealing ice damage to a distant unit.
Exhales flaming breath, dealing fire damage to a distant unit.
Exhales fulminating breath, dealing lightning damage to a distant unit.
Each of three heads lashes out to attack an adjacent unit.
Each of three heads expels insidious breath to attack distant units, reducing the HP of targets by a large proportion of their maximum.
Each of three heads invokes spirits of levin. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing lightning damage.
Each of three heads invokes spirits of flame. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing fire damage.
Each of three heads invokes spirits of darkness. Randomly strikes within the area of effect, dealing dark damage, and has a chance of inflicting instant KO or Sleep.
Unleashes a wave of pure destructive force at a distant unit, dealing damage based on one's HP loss.
Unleashes fellest powers to destroy the very building blocks of matter, dealing damage to distant units.
Follows a top-level command to destroy an adjacent unit. Incurs recoil damage equal to a small proportion of the damage dealt.
Follows a top-level command to compress an adjacent unit. Incurs recoil damage equal to a moderate proportion of the damage dealt.
Follows a top-level command to dispose of a distant unit. Incurs recoil damage equal to a large proportion of the damage dealt.

Ancient magick that inflicts various status ailments on a distant unit.

Grants Jump a horizontal range of 2 tiles.
Horizontal Jump abilities do not stack; only the one with highest value is applied.

Sets the target variable.
The resulting spell will target units based on their current CT.
Must be paired with a trigger value.

Sets the target variable.
The resulting spell will target units based on their current level.
Must be paired with a trigger value.

Sets the target variable.
The resulting spell will target units based on their current EXP.
Must be paired with a trigger value.

Sets the target variable.
The resulting spell will target units based on their current elevation.
Must be paired with a trigger value.

Sets the trigger value.
The resulting spell will be cast on units whose target variable is a prime number.

Sets the trigger value.
The resulting spell will be cast on units whose target variable is a multiple of 5.

Sets the trigger value.
The resulting spell will be cast on units whose target variable is a multiple of 4.

Sets the trigger value.
The resulting spell will be cast on units whose target variable is a multiple of 3.
Upon receiving damage, increases the unit's physical attack power for the duration of battle.
Upon receiving damage, increases the unit's magickal attack power for the duration of battle.
Upon receiving damage, increases the unit's speed for the duration of battle.
Upon receiving a physical attack, grants Invisibility to the unit.
Upon receiving a physical attack, assumes an Evasive Stance, which greatly increases the unit's physical and magickal parry and evasion rates until its next turn.
Upon receiving a physical attack, grants Reraise to the unit.
Upon receiving damage, grants Regen to the unit.
Upon receiving a physical attack, increases the unit's bravery for the duration of battle.
Upon receiving any kind of magick, increases the unit's faith for the duration of battle.
If the unit receives damage and is in critical condition, fully restores the unit's HP.
If the unit receives damage and is in critical condition, fully restores the unit's MP.
If the unit receives damage and is in critical condition, the unit's next turn will come immediately.
If the unit receives damage and is in critical condition, deals damage in return based on the unit's maximum HP. Attack range is determined by the equipped weapon.
Upon receiving a magickal attack, counterattacks by expending MP to cast the same spell.
Upon receiving a physical attack from an adjacent unit, counterattacks with an ability equivalent to Rush.
Upon receiving a physical attack or geomancy skill, counterattacks with a geomancy skill, including those that the unit has yet to learn.
Upon receiving any type of magick, recovers MP equal to the amount used by the caster.
Upon receiving damage, receives gil equal to the amount of damage taken.
MARKED FOR DELETION - REPORT IF DISPLAYED Reflect
Upon receiving damage, uses a potion from the inventory to restore one's own HP. Prioritizes the use of potions of lower potency.
Upon receiving a physical attack, strikes back with the standard Attack command.
When HP is restored, distributes any excess among all allies.
When receiving damage, MP is reduced rather than HP.
Upon receiving damage, deals half of the damage in return and recover HP by the same amount.
Blocks physical attacks received from the front or side with the equipped weapon.
Greatly increases the likelihood of avoiding the effects of Speechcraft.
Upon receiving an attack, greatly increases physical and magickal parry and evasion rates. Ineffective against certain attacks.
The unit catches thrown items that would otherwise strike it, receiving no damage and obtaining the item.
When receiving a physical attack, the unit's parry rate is the same as its bravery value.
Increases the evasion rate against arrow and bolt attacks.

When about to receive certain attacks from a human unit within standard attack range, strikes preemptively and prevents the attack. As this is a special counterattack, the expected outcome will not be displayed.
Allows the unit to equip helms and armor, regardless of job.
Allows the unit to equip shields, regardless of job.
Allows the unit to equip swords, regardless of job.
Allows the unit to equip katana, regardless of job.
Allows the unit to equip crossbows, regardless of job.
Allows the unit to equip polearms, regardless of job.
Allows the unit to equip axes, regardless of job.
Allows the unit to equip guns, regardless of job.
Reduces MP consumption by half when using magicks.
Increases the amount of JP and Job EXP earned in battle.
Increases the amount of EXP earned in battle.
Increases the unit's physical attack power.
Increases the unit's defense against physical attacks.
Increases the unit's magickal attack power.
Increases the unit's defense against magickal attacks.
Ignores the target's physical evasion, ensuring that physical attacks always hit.
Forces a critically wounded enemy creature to become an ally. At the end of battle, that unit will officially join your party.
Allows the unit to claim a creature's carcass by defeating it with the standard Attack command.
Delivers more powerful bare-handed attacks, even if not a monk.
Allows the use of Speechcraft against creatures, even if not an orator.
Allows the unit to throw items with the Items command within a range of 4 tiles like a chemist, even if using a different job.
Prevents equipment from being destroyed or stolen.

Allows the unit to wield a single-handed weapon with both hands.
Certain weapons can be equipped in this manner, greatly increasing their attack power.

Allows the unit to wield a weapon in each hand, even if not a ninja.
Certain weapons can be equipped in this manner, allowing the unit to attack twice each turn.
Adds a hidden ability to all allied creatures in neighboring tiles with an elevation difference of up to 3.
Adds the Evasive Stance command, which greatly increases the unit's physical and magickal parry and evasion rates until its next turn.
Adds the Reequip command, which allows the unit to use its turn to change equipment during battle.
Reduces the time needed to cast magick spells.
Increases movement by 1, allowing the unit to move a greater distance.
Increases movement by 2, allowing the unit to move a greater distance.
Increases movement by 3, allowing the unit to move a greater distance.
Increases jump attribute by 1, allowing the unit to traverse greater elevation differences.
Increases jump attribute by 2, allowing the unit to traverse greater elevation differences.
Increases jump attribute by 3, allowing the unit to traverse greater elevation differences.
Allows the unit to move to tiles of any height, regardless of its jump attribute.
Recovers HP upon moving. Movement cannot be reset for units with this ability.
Recovers MP upon moving. Movement cannot be reset for units with this ability.
Grants EXP upon moving. Movement cannot be reset for units with this ability.
Grants JP and Job EXP upon moving. Movement cannot be reset for units with this ability.

Allows the unit to warp instantly to destination tiles. May fail when attempting to travel to locations that exceed the unit's movement and jump attributes. Movement cannot be reset for units with this ability.
Allows the unit to warp instantly to destination tiles. Teleportation will not fail even when attempting to travel to locations that exceed the unit's movement and jump attributes.
Allows the unit to move unimpeded through terrain affected by rainfall, such as marshes, swamps, and poisonous fens.
Allows the unit to move unimpeded through difficult terrain, such as canals, rivers, lakes, and the ocean.
Allows the unit to move across and even stop on the surface of water.
Allows the unit to swim through and even stop in deep water.
Allows the unit to move across and even stop on the surface of lava.
Grants permanent Float status in battle, allowing movement while levitating at an elevation of 1 above the ground.
Allows the unit to move by flying, passing over enemies and obstacles.
Allows the unit to discover items hidden on tiles upon moving to them. The probability of finding rare items is increased for chemists.
